docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIA-DELMAS, JOCELYNE AS TO DEFENDANT CASHGATE INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
